objective: Harden the existing Pages deploy gate missing-secret UX so it lists required variable names only and points to approved provisioning surfaces.
scope_boundary: Issue #511 owns the governance-owned Pages deploy gate missing-env diagnostics, focused tests, runbook wording, and supporting GOV registry/progress/validation updates.
Extend scripts/pages-deploy/pages_deploy_gate.py and its existing test suite; do not create a second deploy gate, wrapper, or secret provisioning runner.
Cross-link active Cloudflare Pages direct-upload deploy gate epic #467 without broadening deployment scope.
out_of_scope: Changing Cloudflare API permissions or token scopes.
Changing the no-secret evidence validator; issue #510 owns that and is closed.
Governance-wide runbook scrub; issue #512 owns that.
Downstream governed repo inventory and routing; issue #513 owns that.
Secret rotation, value provisioning, or any commit of .env.shared, generated .env files, provider tokens, raw phone numbers, signed URLs, Authorization headers, or credential screenshots.
research_summary: The #511 review found that GOV already has the right extension points: pages_deploy_gate.py owns preflight_env, scripts/pages-deploy/tests/test_pages_deploy_gate.py owns missing-env and approval behavior coverage, and docs/runbooks/pages-deploy-gate.md owns operator guidance. The implementation should update those existing surfaces only and use the #510 provisioning-evidence Local CI Gate check as a guardrail.

sprints.name: Sprint 3 - Pages deploy missing-secret UX
sprints.goal: Make missing Cloudflare Pages credentials actionable without inline export recipes or secret values.
tasks: Update pages_deploy_gate.py missing-env output to include required variable names only plus canonical Secret Provisioning UX guidance.
Add or update focused tests for missing CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID diagnostics.
Assert missing-env output does not include secret values, inline export recipes, or placeholder token commands.
Update docs/runbooks/pages-deploy-gate.md with canonical provisioning wording and cross-link issue #467.
Record implementation validation without committing secrets or generated env files.
acceptance_criteria: Missing-env diagnostics list variable names only and point to hldpro-governance/.env.shared, bootstrap-generated ignored repo env files, provider dashboards/vaults, or GitHub Actions secrets as appropriate.
Tests cover missing CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID output and assert no secret values or inline export recipes appear.
Existing dry-run behavior and PAGES_DEPLOY_APPROVED live-deploy approval behavior remain unchanged.
The runbook uses canonical Secret Provisioning UX wording and cross-links #467 without expanding deploy scope.
Local CI Gate passes, including provisioning-evidence-safety.

specialist_reviews.focus: Avoid overloading the repo with a new deploy or secret provisioning tool.
specialist_reviews.summary: Use the current Pages deploy gate preflight, tests, runbook, and #510 Local CI Gate evidence validator; no new runner is needed.

alternate_model_review.reviewer: not requested for scoped Pages deploy gate UX extension
alternate_model_review.summary: This lane modifies existing Pages deploy gate behavior under the approved Secret Provisioning UX epic and does not introduce a new architecture.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #511 may update the existing Pages deploy gate preflight UX, focused tests, Pages deploy gate runbook, and supporting GOV registry/progress/validation artifacts.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Merge this implementation scope as a planning-only PR, then implement the gate UX hardening on the same issue branch name so CI can trust the base scope.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: Execution scope validates with lane claim.
Local CI gate passes before merge.

material_deviation_rules: If the Pages deploy gate needs new deployment semantics, stop and route to the active Cloudflare Pages direct-upload deploy gate epic #467.

If evidence would contain credential values, signed URLs, Authorization headers, raw phone numbers, generated env files, or screenshots containing credentials, replace it with redacted structured evidence before commit.
If downstream repos need fixes, route to #513 and owning repo issues instead of mutating them here.
